text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
The Hopeful Stakes, at last! Holy moly, there are
sooo many people here!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: But I practiced so much, I can do it for sure!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
If I can handle the distance of today's race, I'll be
one step closer to the Derby!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Alrighty! I'm gonna go full speed!
